skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-doc</name>
    <description>Feishu document read/write operations. Activate when user mentions Feishu docs, cloud docs, or docx links.
</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/extensions/feishu/skills/feishu-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-drive</name>
    <description>Feishu cloud storage file management. Activate when user mentions cloud space, folders, drive.
</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/extensions/feishu/skills/feishu-drive/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-perm</name>
    <description>Feishu permission management for documents and files. Activate when user mentions sharing, permissions, collaborators.
</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/extensions/feishu/skills/feishu-perm/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-wiki</name>
    <description>Feishu knowledge base navigation. Activate when user mentions knowledge base, wiki, or wiki links.
</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/extensions/feishu/skills/feishu-wiki/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coze-email-ops</name>
    <description>Email sending using SMTP with nodemailer. Supports plain text, HTML emails, and attachments. Compatible with Gmail, Outlook, QQ Mail, and other SMTP services.</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/coze-email-ops/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coze-excel-ops</name>
    <description>Excel file generation, reading, and manipulation using Node.js libraries. Supports creating spreadsheets, reading data, exporting to CSV/JSON, and modifying cells.</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/coze-excel-ops/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coze-image-gen</name>
    <description>Generate high-quality images (2K/4K) via coze-coding-dev-sdk. Returns image URLs directly without downloading.</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/coze-image-gen/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coze-pdf-ops</name>
    <description>PDF generation, reading, and manipulation using Node.js libraries. Supports creating PDFs from text/markdown, extracting text from existing PDFs, and modifying PDF content.</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/coze-pdf-ops/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coze-voice-gen</name>
    <description>Text-to-Speech (TTS) and Speech-to-Text (ASR) using coze-coding-dev-sdk. Returns results directly to stdout.</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/coze-voice-gen/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coze-web-search</name>
    <description>Search the web using coze-coding-dev-sdk. Supports web search, image search, AI summaries, time filters, and site restrictions.</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/coze-web-search/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coze-word-ops</name>
    <description>Word document generation and reading using Node.js libraries. Supports creating DOCX files from text/markdown, extracting content from existing documents, and formatting with styles.</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/coze-word-ops/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>news-verification</name>
    <description>AI圈新闻和日报的置信度验证与生成系统。适用于每日AI新闻整理、日报撰写、事件分析。当需要验证新闻真实性、评估消息可信度、或生成AI日报时触发。核心功能：置信度评分、新闻分类、基于高分内容生成结论、提问式引导思考。</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/news-verification/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>ui-ux-pro-max</name>
    <description>UI/UX design intelligence and implementation guidance. Generate UI layouts, improve existing UI/UX, create design systems, and produce frontend code (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Tailwind).</description>
    <location>/workspace/projects/workspace/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>
